q: Which of the following is a zoonotic disease?
options: Sickle cell anemia, which can be passed from mother to child during pregnancy
Influenza, which can be transmitted from birds or pigs to humans
Type 1 diabetes, an autoimmune disease triggered by viral mimicry
Atherosclerosis, which spreads via contaminated food among members of a household
explanation: Zoonoses are diseases that transfer from other animal species to humans; influenza viruses naturally infect birds and pigs and can jump to human hosts, sometimes causing pandemics.
